name: NIST AI RMF
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external risk-management crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: NIST AI RMF can support risk management and trustworthiness comparison.
NIST AI RMF can be mapped to lifecycle review and evaluation support terms.
non_claims: NIST AI RMF does not prove transition admissibility.
Voluntary guidance does not grant execution authority.
The wiki relationship record is not acceptance of equivalence.

transition_table_mapping.claims: risk management, trustworthiness considerations, lifecycle review, evaluation support
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, certification, endorsement, or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external guidance posture; no StegVerse authority inherited
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct risk-management relationship limits
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: may inform evidence/review posture, not standing determination
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: Evidence Posture, Review Posture, Governance Boundary, Policy Reference
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, undefined mapping, or authority overclaim

SPE_overlap.authority_evaluation: not performed by NIST AI RMF

fail_closed_conditions: any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
